mapper.sql: SELECT n.notice_id, p.payment_id, p.contract_id, c.customer_id, p.park_id, n.notice_no, CONCAT('ZD', p.payment_id) AS payment_no, c.contract_no, c.customer_name, c.building_name, c.room_name, bc.contact_phone, bc.contact_email, p.fee_name, p.period_start, p.period_end, p.amount_due, p.amount_paid, p.pay_deadline, COALESCE(n.sms_status, 'pending') AS sms_status, COALESCE(n.email_status, 'pending') AS email_status, COALESCE(n.inbox_status, 'pending') AS inbox_status, COALESCE(n.miniapp_status, 'pending') AS miniapp_status, n.miniapp_send_time, COALESCE(n.send_count, 0) AS send_count, n.last_send_time, n.file_name, n.file_url, n.remark, DATE(COALESCE(n.create_time, p.create_time, p.pay_deadline)) AS generated_date FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id LEFT JOIN biz_customer bc ON bc.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN biz_payment_notice n ON n.payment_id = p.payment_id AND n.del_flag = '0'

if.test: query != null and query.customerName != null and query.customerName != ''
query != null and query.paymentNo != null and query.paymentNo != ''

sql.if: AND ( CONCAT('ZD', p.payment_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentNo}, '%') OR CAST(p.payment_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentNo}, '%') OR n.notice_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentNo}, '%') )

if.test: query != null and query.smsStatus != null and query.smsStatus != ''
query != null and query.emailStatus != null and query.emailStatus != ''
query != null and query.inboxStatus != null and query.inboxStatus != ''
query != null and query.miniappStatus != null and query.miniappStatus != ''
query != null and query.buildingName != null and query.buildingName != ''

mapper.select: ORDER BY COALESCE(n.create_time, p.create_time, p.pay_deadline) DESC, p.payment_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) AS generated_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(n.sms_status, 'pending') = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sms_success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(n.email_status, 'pending') = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS email_success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(n.inbox_status, 'pending') = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inbox_success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(n.miniapp_status, 'pending') = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS miniapp_success_count FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id LEFT JOIN biz_customer bc ON bc.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN biz_payment_notice n ON n.payment_id = p.payment_id AND n.del_flag = '0'

SELECT notice_id, payment_id, notice_no, notice_type, sms_status, email_status, inbox_status, send_count, last_send_time, file_name, file_url, miniapp_status, miniapp_send_time, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM biz_payment_notice WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY notice_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT c.building_name FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id LEFT JOIN biz_payment_notice n ON n.payment_id = p.payment_id AND n.del_flag = '0'
c.building_name IS NOT NULL AND c.building_name != ''
ORDER BY c.building_name ASC
